content:
It makes sense to me that these answers should both be "Yes" on a functional level, but I wanted to make sure there's not some edge case.

Both questions can be summarized with one line: "The Final Vow" Posse.
> Obtain `[Arg1]`% Temporary Crit. Rate and `[Arg2]` `<PowerIconKeywords:STR>`. If in a Leader fight and no cards have been played this turn, attempt to trigger `[Arg3]` Death Resistance. If successful, gain `<Block:[Block:Arg4]>` Shield. This Effect can only trigger `[Arg5]` times.
First, "attempt to trigger `[Arg3]` Death Resistance" makes no sense since I don't understand any situation in which Arg3 can be any number except 1, so I'd like to omit it; on the same note, Arg5 is also only ever 1, so I'd like to replace "`[Arg5]` times" with "once".
Second, this line is missing the tag `<DeathResistanceIconKeywords:>`. Is it not possible for me to add this tag here when it's not present in CN? <@1376763322568937562> **Please let me know if the following would not work:**

CN
> 获得 `[Arg1]`% 临时暴击率和 `[Arg2]` 点临时`<PowerIconKeywords:力量>`。 若在首领战中且本回合尚未打出过任何牌，则尝试触发 `[Arg3]` 次死亡抵抗，若成功则获得 `<Block:[Block:Arg4]>` 点护盾，此效果只能触发 `[Arg5]` 次。

EN
> Gain +`[Arg1]`% Temp. Crit. Rate and `[Arg2]` <PowerIconKeywords:STR>. If you're in a Final Battle and have played no cards this turn, attempt to trigger `<DeathResistanceIconKeywords:Death Resistance>`. If successful, gain `<Block:[Block:Arg4]>` Shield. This effect can only trigger once per battle.

This is also important to me as I'd like to clarify STR Steal effects to "Inflict `<ExhaustionIconKeywords:STR▼>`" instead of "Reduce `<PowerIconKeywords:STR>`". Thanks!

Hi!

No, we cannot omit any Args!

It will lead to bugs

Okay, thanks! I'm definitely very curious about the RTTs though, as it would be greatly beneficial to spread those around. Now that I think about it though, I believe it would be best to keep a list of lines that are missing or could utilize those tags to help the CN text out too, so I'm gonna do that instead!

To be specific:

We can reorder, or repeat the Args in English translation. 

If the CN text first mentions Arg1, then Arg2 and Arg3: 
The English version can put Arg2 first, then Arg1, or mention Arg2 twice, and it would still be fine.

But when we omit Arg3:
The system expects to slot Arg3's value into a placeholder but finds none. 
Sometimes it's fine. Sometimes nothing happens.
Sometimes it may incorrectly substitute the next value, or freeze the game.
Also, I think they made it [Arg3] Death Resistance so they could potentially make it "trigger 2 Death Resistance" one day when they need to without having to change the text

Sounds good! Thank you for clarifying~
I also just realized that my second question is already answered with evidence from the game:
The CN version does in fact have the Exhaustion tag, where the English version has a Power tag.
I'll still keep a list somewhere of line Keys where I add a tag that isn't in the CN, so that it can be used to make the CN text better!

yes, previously  when the description says "reduce STR", the STR still used the green tag; i think last version we began changing "reduce STR" to the purple tag for clarity. we forgot to update the English version of this line, it seems
ty for pointing it out we'll fix it now
fixed! it should correctly show the purple tag `<ExhaustionIconKeywords: 衰竭>` (Drain) next update

`<ExhaustionIconKeywords:力量>/<ExhaustionIconKeywords:STR>`: Text becomes purple. Displays the "Drain" tag next to it. reserved for when a skill reduces STR.
`<PowerIconKeywords:力量>`/`<PowerIconKeywords:STR>`: Text becomes green. Displays the "STR" tag next to it.
